texto: This Earle of Oxford, making of his low obeisance to Queen Elizabeth, happened to let a Fart, at which he was so abashed and ashamed that he went to Travell, 7 yeares. On his returne the Queen welcomed him home, and sayd, My Lord, I had forgott the Fart.
explicacao: Citação de John Aubrey sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “This Earle of Oxford, making of his low obeisance to Queen Elizabeth, happened to let a Fart, at …” articula reflexao, history, humour em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e humour.
